specific_question: What is the average time Elexion Automotive car batteries spent in showrooms before being sold to customers in 2024?
answer: During the year 2024, Elexion Automotive car batteries spent an average of 54 days in showrooms before being sold.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
